{
  "name": "express-tailwind-starter",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "ts-node-dev --respawn --transpile-only src/server.ts",
    "dev:css": "tailwindcss -c tailwind.config.js -i ./src/public/styles.css -o ./src/public/tailwind.css --watch",
    "dev:all": "concurrently -k -n server,css -c blue,magenta \"npm:dev\" \"npm:dev:css\"",
    "build": "tsc",
    "postbuild": "copyfiles -u 1 src/public/** dist/public",
    "build:css": "tailwindcss -c tailwind.config.js -i ./src/public/styles.css -o ./dist/public/tailwind.css",
    "build:all": "npm run build && npm run build:css",
    "start": "node dist/server.js",
    "test": "jest"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "express": "^4.19.2"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/express": "^4.17.21",
    "@types/jest": "^29.5.14",
    "@types/node": "^20.12.12",
    "@types/supertest": "^2.0.16",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.4.19",
    "concurrently": "^9.0.1",
    "copyfiles": "^2.4.1",
    "jest": "^29.7.0",
    "postcss": "^8.4.41",
    "supertest": "^7.0.0",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.4.10",
    "ts-jest": "^29.2.5",
    "ts-node-dev": "^2.0.0",
    "typescript": "^5.6.2"
  }
}

Hello World

Express server with Tailwind CSS served from /public on port 4445.

# Express + Tailwind Starter (Port 4445)

This project provides a minimal Express server serving static files from `src/public` with Tailwind CSS.

- Framework: Express
- Port: 4445 (default)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS (CLI)

## Scripts
- `npm run dev` — Run the Express server with ts-node-dev
- `npm run dev:css` — Watch and build Tailwind CSS into `src/public/tailwind.css`
- `npm run dev:all` — Run both the server and Tailwind watcher concurrently
- `npm run build` — Compile TypeScript to `dist`
- `npm run build:css` — Build Tailwind CSS to `dist/public/tailwind.css`
- `npm run build:all` — Build TS and CSS for production
- `npm start` — Start compiled server from `dist`
- `npm test` — Run automated tests

## Getting Started
1. Install dependencies:
   - `npm install`
2. Start development server and Tailwind watcher:
   - `npm run dev:all`
3. Open http://localhost:4445

## Production Build
1. Build everything:
   - `npm run build:all`
2. Start the server:
   - `npm start`

## Notes
- Static files are served from `src/public` during development and from `dist/public` after build.
- The server listens on port `4445` by default. You can override with `PORT` env var if needed.

notes: Run npm run dev:all to start the server on http://localhost:4445 and watch Tailwind CSS.
Tests can be run with npm test.
After building with npm run build:all, run npm start to serve from dist.
